title: Happy Together
why_this_song: Happy Together by The Turtles (1967) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 12 times; first heard in: "So happy together"
Appears 12 times; first heard in: "So happy together"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "I can't see me lovin' nobody but you for all my life"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "No matter how they tossed the dice"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "No matter how they tossed the dice"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: If I should call you up, invest a dime
And you say you belong to me
Me and you, and you and me
No matter how they tossed the dice
The only one for me is you

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "happy" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "happy" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "together" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "together" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Happy Together", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Happy Together", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Happy Together" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Happy Together" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Happy Together" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Happy Together", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
